report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v9: 4 new learn guides staged in Degen0x working dir (liquid-staking, prediction-markets, airdrops, cross-chain-bridges — 2,734 lines). cryptodegen repo now at 50 uncommitted files (up from 41 in v8). Published slugs at 631 (+3 from v8). All 6 API routes intact. Deploy still blocked on commit+push.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 18 learn page.tsx files in Degen0x staging dir — UP from 14 in v7. 4 new since v7: liquid-staking-tokens (954 lines), crypto-prediction-markets (806 lines), crypto-airdrops-farming (484 lines), cross-chain-bridges-interoperability (490 lines).
All 4 new pages have JSON-LD structured data, OpenGraph tags, and breadcrumb navigation. Standard metadata export pattern confirmed.
cryptodegen production repo: 1,240 page.tsx files on disk — STABLE from v8.
631 published slugs (up 3 from v8's 628). New slugs added in uncommitted published-pages.ts edit.
141 TypeScript errors — STABLE. All non-blocking under ignoreBuildErrors: true.
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx (17% indexing gap) — unchanged, needs scaffolding sprint.
1 new component in working tree: StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx (untracked).
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live HTTP status codes or production structured data.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present in codebase: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields — UNCHANGED.
17 total API routes on disk (6 core + admin, cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter/3, notifications/2, standup-email, subscribe).
No API route code changes this cycle. In-memory cache + Next.js ISR + Vercel CDN 3-layer stack intact.
prices route: full cache/fallback pattern (12 cache refs, 3 Cache-Control headers, 1 fallback).
market-dominance: full pattern (11 cache refs, 4 Cache-Control, 4 fallback refs).
fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields: simpler patterns — rely on Next.js revalidate + Vercel CDN.
defi-yields still lacks explicit stale fallback data — persistent P2 gap.
Egress blocked — cannot verify live API responses, upstream CoinGecko/DefiLlama health, or data freshness.

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD: 3b2dd28 — UNCHANGED. No new commits since build fix. Production running Mar 24 deployment.
50 uncommitted files in cryptodegen (up from 41 in v8): 35 untracked + 15 modified.
New untracked assets since v8: og-wallet-analyzer.svg, social-pectra-countdown-5days.svg, social-tax-deadline-14days.svg, StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, 9+ new report files.
Modified files: 9 learn page edits, 1 tool page (stablecoin-yield-tracker), 2 skill files, 2 report updates.
Build expected to pass — 141 TS errors non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
DEPLOY BLOCKER PERSISTS: All 50 uncommitted files need commit+push to trigger Vercel auto-deploy.
Egress blocked — cannot verify Vercel dashboard or production deployment status.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA SINCE V8: 4 new learn guides staged in Degen0x dir (liquid-staking, prediction-markets, airdrops, cross-chain-bridges = 2,734 lines). New data registry v9 created with 2 entries. Published slugs +3 to 631. 9 more uncommitted files in cryptodegen.
CONTENT PIPELINE STATUS: 18 learn guides in Degen0x staging + 304 learn guides in cryptodegen production = 322 total learn content pieces across both repos.

P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY): 50 uncommitted files need commit+push. Pectra upgrade window Apr 10 (9 days). Tax deadline Apr 15 (14 days). Both timely guides need deployed content for search traffic capture.
P1 CARRY-OVER: 109 published slugs missing page.tsx (17% indexing gap). Needs dedicated scaffolding cycle.
P2 CARRY-OVER: defi-yields fallback gap. 141 TS errors (stable). Legacy breadcrumbs on some learn pages.
NO NEW BLOCKERS requiring Jefe's attention beyond the persistent commit+push action.
